##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box]Li_2_[Fe^2+^_3_Al_2_]Si_8_O_22_(OH,F)_2_
##LOCALITY=Quebec Lithium Corporation mine, La Corne, Abitibi RCM, Abitibi-Témiscamingue, Québec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald V Doell

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
